sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87880" key="prokukle/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκυκλ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n87880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roll forth</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">out,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">παλάθαν ἐκ πίονος οἴκου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Carm.Pop.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
